OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Kam Sheung Man is present in pro per.
Cantonese interpreter, Andrew Kong, is present to interpret for the plaintiff.

Defendant Paul Stein is present.
Attorney, James Daire, representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of October 22, 2007 is vacated.
